title: Lloyd Law College launches Harry Chawla Center for Corporate Governance
description: Lloyd Law College has launched the Harry Chawla Center for Corporate Governance in honour of the Managing Partner, Luthra and Luthra Law Offices, Harry Chawla.The inauguration ceremony was held in the presence of Supreme Court of India, Justice Kotiswar Singh. The Centre has been established under the guidance and leadership of Manohar Thairani, Mohd Salim, and Akhilesh Kumar Khan.Lloyd Law College, Harry Chawla CenterThe Centre will serve as a platform for engagement among s
